intended_flow: Send /start, pick a language from the inline buttons
Send a voice message in Uzbek (e.g. 'sotuvdan 1 200 000 keldi bugun')
Show the bot's natural confirmation reply with the 🗑 Delete inline button
Switch to https://cashflow-bot-bice.vercel.app/ in another browser tab
Show the new transaction has appeared via Server-Sent-Events live sync (toast notification + Recent activity row + KPI numbers update)
Optional: tap '📋 Recent' in the bot to confirm the same transaction is visible there
Optional: open Analytics page to show sparklines, heatmap, recurring-pattern detection, cash-flow forecast
screen_recording.where_to_upload: Loom or YouTube unlisted; paste the URL into the field below

product_brief: Cashflow Manager is for owners and finance staff of small-to-medium businesses in Uzbekistan who today track cash via WhatsApp voice notes, paper notebooks, and scattered Excel sheets. The problem it solves is the gap between the people closest to the money (drivers, sellers, the owner's spouse) — who won't open a laptop — and the owner who needs a single source of truth to decide whether to make payroll, take an order, or raise prices. The bot lets the whole team log income and expenses by voice or text in Uzbek, Russian, or English, and the dashboard turns those entries into KPIs with sparklines, an activity heatmap, recurring-payment detection, and a 30-day cash-flow forecast — including a runway estimate that flags when the business will run out of money. v2 would add receipt-photo OCR via Telegram, multi-user roles with Telegram-side approval flow for large expenses, and a 'month close' review screen that walks the owner through every flagged anomaly in five minutes.
next_3_days: With three more days I would ship receipt-photo OCR — a user sends a photo of a receipt to the bot, Gemini vision extracts the merchant, line items, and total, and the bot pre-fills a transaction with the photo attached and viewable in the dashboard, since paper receipts are the single biggest unsolved friction for these businesses. After that, a 'month close' review screen that walks the owner through every anomaly-flagged transaction, every uncategorized entry, and a one-click 'looks right' button — turning the dashboard from a passive ledger into a five-minute monthly ritual. Finally, a Telegram-side spending-approval flow ('Karim wants to spend 4M on Inventory — approve / decline?') so the owner stops being a bottleneck on routine spend without losing oversight, with the approval UI built directly on the inline-keyboard pattern the bot already uses.

stack_summary.backend: Same Next.js process — RSC pages, Server Actions, Route Handlers (/api/telegram/webhook, /api/events SSE, /api/summary)
stack_summary.database: Postgres on Neon via @neondatabase/serverless (HTTP/WebSocket driver, scales to zero)
stack_summary.llm: Google Gemini 2.5 Flash Lite (via @google/genai) — handles audio transcription + intent parsing in one call. Multi-key rotation for free-tier headroom.

telegram_bot.intent_routing: log income / log expense / report / edit / delete / create category / delete category / change language / smalltalk
telegram_bot.queries_data_through_bot: yes — '/report', natural-language questions, category-filtered reports, custom date queries
telegram_bot.edit_or_delete_recent_transaction: yes — natural language ('no it was 200k'), inline 🗑 button, /undo, '📋 Recent' tap-to-delete with confirmation step
telegram_bot.create_custom_categories: yes — both via the Categories dashboard page and via natural language to the bot

overview_page: Total income / expenses / net for current period
Comparison vs previous period (% delta on every KPI)
Sparkline mini-chart inside each KPI card (14-day trend)
Daily activity heatmap (last 13 weeks, color-graded by net flow)
Recurring-pattern detection panel with next-due dates
Onboarding hero + 3-step checklist when no data exists
transactions_page: Filter by date range / category / type
Live debounced search across notes and category labels
Inline edit + delete with custom in-app confirmation modal (no native browser dialog)
Anomaly flags on transactions ≥ 3× the 90-day median for that category
analytics_page: Donut breakdowns for both income and expense by category
30-day cash-flow forecast with projected line + recurring transactions baked in
categories_page: CRUD with localized labels in uz/ru/en
web_dashboard.auto_sync_with_bot: yes — Server-Sent Events stream (/api/events). Every Server Action and bot mutation publishes an event; open dashboard tabs refresh + show a 🤖 toast within seconds.
web_dashboard.onboarding_for_empty_state: polished hero + 3-step checklist with Telegram QR + 'Open the bot' CTA

bonus_unprompted_features: Cash-flow runway: months-of-runway from trailing 30-day burn, with ⚠️/🟡/🟢 health emoji
Anomaly detection: flag transactions ≥3× the 90-day median for their category
Recurring transaction detection (rent, payroll, subscriptions) with cadence + next-due date
30-day cash-flow forecast — historical balance line + projected line using detected recurring + trailing burn
Real-time SSE sync between bot and dashboard (no refresh needed)
Tap-only bot UX — persistent main menu + step-by-step Add wizard for non-technical users
QR code modal in dashboard topbar so reviewers can scan to open the bot on phone
Multi-key Gemini rotation with auto 429 fallback for free-tier resilience
In-app confirmation modal replacing native browser dialogs
